title: Agent
description: An AI agent with ERC-8004 metadata.

schema.description: URI pointing to the agent schema

agent-uri.description: URI pointing to an ERC-8004 registration file

avatar.description: URI pointing to the agent's avatar image

services.description: URI pointing to a payload containing the agent's services

x402-support.description: Indicates whether or not the agent supports x402 payments

active.description: Indicates whether or not the agent is currently active

registrations.description: URI pointing to a payload containing the agent's cross-chain identity registrations

supported-trust.description: Trust models supported by the agent

agent-wallet.description: The address where the agent receives payments

^registrations([[^]]+])?$.description: An array of ERC-8004 registrations belonging to the agent, following CAIP-19 format

^services([[^]]+])?$.description: A map of service names to their endpoints

^supported-trust([[^]]+])?$.description: An array of trust models supported by the agent
